metaTitle: About Used Slot Shop — 33+ Years of Slot Machine Expertise
metaDescription: Used Slot Shop has been refurbishing, selling, and servicing casino slot machines from our Kingman, Arizona headquarters since 1992. Meet the team and our refurbishment process.
title: Since 1992, we've refurbished over 12,000 slot machines.
subtitle: From a single bay in Kingman, Arizona, to one of the most trusted names in the private slot machine market.

paragraphs: Used Slot Shop started as a one-man repair operation in 1992. Three decades later, we're a family-run business with a dedicated technician team, a deep parts inventory, and customers in every U.S. state — plus a growing list of international collectors.

sections.heading: What makes us different
paragraphs: There are a lot of places to buy a slot machine online. Most are resellers who flip auction lots with a rag and a spray bottle. We're different for three reasons:
bullets: We refurbish everything in-house. Every machine we sell passes through our Kingman bench, where certified technicians spend an average of 18–40 hours per unit.
We stock parts. Our parts warehouse is one of the deepest in the country for legacy IGT, Bally, WMS, and Aristocrat platforms. That means your machine can be serviced in 10 years, not 10 weeks.
We answer the phone. Same number. Same people. Same expertise.

sections.heading: Our refurbishment process
bullets: Full strip-down and inspection of all assemblies
Deep cleaning — cabinet, internals, and glass
Bench testing of main board, RAM, power supply, bill validator, hopper/printer, and display
Component replacement where needed — caps, fuses, switches, steppers
LED re-lamping for consistent long-term brightness
Reel strip replacement, bezel polishing, button refresh
Casino-grade compliance testing of RNG and paytable behavior
48-hour burn-in test before final QC sign-off

sections.heading: Where to find us
paragraphs: Walk-ins welcome by appointment — visit our contact page to schedule a visit. Our business info (address, phone, email) lives in the Site Settings panel and appears automatically across the site.
